/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_complex.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_complex.dir/test_complex.cpp.o -o ../bin/tests/test_complex  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rperdi/projects/cplusplus/repos/OrdenarEnteros/build_static/lib ../lib/libordenamiento_lib.so.1.0.0 ../lib/libgtest_main.so.1.14.0 ../lib/libgtest.so.1.14.0
